title: Xtra Crunchy Indian Chickpeas Chaat
description: A macrobiotic-friendly Indian chaat dish featuring smoky paprika and dehydrated chickpeas, perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Drain and rinse the chickpeas, then spread them on a baking sheet.
Dehydrate the chickpeas in the oven for 30 minutes, or until crispy.
In a large bowl, mix together the smoky paprika, garam masala, cumin powder, coriander powder, amchur powder, and salt.
Add the dehydrated chickpeas to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
In a small bowl, mix together the lemon juice and chopped cilantro.
Add the lemon juice mixture to the bowl with the chickpeas and toss to coat.
Stir in the chopped onion and tomato.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the Xtra Crunchy Indian Chickpeas Chaat immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
